/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/FuzzVST_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o" -o FuzzVST_artefacts/Release/Standalone/FuzzVST.app/Contents/MacOS/FuzzVST  FuzzVST_artefacts/Release/libFuzzVST_SharedCode.a -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -framework QuartzCore -framework Accelerate -flto -Wl,-weak_reference_mismatches,weak
